tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_deploy_succeeds
tests.trace:
@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
    def deployed_app():
        """Deploy and run the app before running tests."""
        deploy_result = modal_cli("deploy", APP_FILE, timeout=600)
        assert deploy_result.returncode == 0, (
            f"modal deploy failed:\nstdout: {deploy_result.stdout}\nstderr: {deploy_result.stderr}"
        )
        run_result = modal_cli("run", APP_FILE, timeout=300)
>       assert run_result.returncode == 0, (
            f"modal run failed:\nstdout: {run_result.stdout}\nstderr: {run_result.stderr}"
        )
E       AssertionError: modal run failed:
E         stdout: ✓ Initialized. View run at 
E         https://modal.com/apps/tabbyml/modal-vsdatagen/ap-MvwL5eF7KbCinbcdacOkC1
E         ✓ Created objects.
E         ├── 🔨 Created mount /home/user/modal_class/app.py
E         └── 🔨 Created function TextClassifier.*.
E         Stopping app - uncaught exception raised locally: TypeError("'Function' object is not callable").
E         
E         stderr: ╭───────────────────── Traceback (most recent call last) ──────────────────────╮
E         │ /home/user/modal_class/app.py:77 in main                                     │
E         │                                                                              │
E         │   76 │                                                                       │
E         │ ❱ 77 │   result1 = classifier.classify("This product is amazing and I love i │
E         │   78 │   print(f"Classification 1: {result1}")                               │
E         ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
E         TypeError: 'Function' object is not callable
E         
E       assert 1 == 0
E        +  where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['modal', 'run', '/home/user/modal_class/app.py'], returncode=1, stdout='✓ Initialized. View run...──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\nTypeError: \'Function\' object is not callable\n').returncode
